mapper.select: SELECT * FROM chapter_quiz_results WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND chapter_id = #{chapterId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chapter_quiz_results (user_id, chapter_id, total_score, max_score, correct_count, total_count, attempt_count, is_passed, submitted_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{chapterId}, #{totalScore}, #{maxScore}, #{correctCount}, #{totalCount}, #{attemptCount}, #{isPassed}, #{submittedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(AVG(total_score), 0) FROM chapter_quiz_results WHERE user_id = #{userId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM chapter_quiz_results WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_passed = TRUE
